rationale: EU accession process for Ukraine and Moldova remains the dominant story for Romania as a direct neighbor of both; no new escalation in the Black Sea region this cycle.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Formal EU accession process for Ukraine and Moldova is highly significant for Romania — a direct neighbor of both — reinforcing regional stability and Romania's geopolitical neighborhood.

top_events.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
top_events.summary: Iran's Hormuz reopening signal could ease energy costs for Romania if a deal materializes, offering mild indirect relief on energy bills and inflation.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Putin's acknowledgment of war-induced strain is a continued qualitative signal relevant to Romania's Black Sea security calculus, though no direct incident occurred.
